query:
INSERT INTO timeline_events (event_date, title, summary, case_number, category, status, public_status, issue_tags, story_id) VALUES
('2024-01-17', 'Substitution of counsel — Sydney Hutt replaces Cooper Brinson', 'Sydney Hutt replaced Cooper Brinson as defense counsel within the Alternate Public Defender''s Office.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001),
('2024-04-23', 'Trial continued — stand-in counsel requests vacation of trial date', 'Court minutes summarized in exhibit spreadsheet state stand-in counsel moved to vacate trial date due to lead counsel''s emergency leave.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '["speedy_trial_delay"]', 60001),
('2024-05-08', 'Pro se motion to dismiss and request for new counsel filed', 'Cameron Church filed pro se motion alleging ineffective assistance, lack of victim, and issues with a Young hearing request.', 'CR23-0657', 'motion', 'confirmed', 1, '["faretta_self_representation","access_to_courts_interference"]', 60001),
('2024-05-09', 'Order striking defendant''s pro se motion to dismiss', 'Judge Barry L. Breslow struck defendant''s pro se motion because Church was represented by counsel. Issue: hybrid representation / Faretta / access to courts.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '["faretta_self_representation","access_to_courts_interference"]', 60001),
('2024-05-16', 'Sydney Hutt requests Young hearing', 'Sydney Hutt filed request for a Young hearing, formalizing claimed breakdown in attorney-client relationship.', 'CR23-0657', 'motion', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001),
('2024-05-30', 'Young hearing — APD relieved; conflict counsel referral ordered', 'Young-hearing minutes/summary state APD office was relieved due to conflict and matter was referred for conflict-counsel appointment.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001),
('2024-06-03', 'Galen Carrico appointed as conflict counsel', 'Recommendation and order appointing counsel identifies Galen Carrico as appointed conflict counsel in CR23-0657.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001),
('2024-07-10', 'Jury trial set for March 24, 2025', 'Application for setting placed jury trial on March 24, 2025 and pretrial motions hearing on February 13, 2025.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001),
('2024-09-11', 'Second Young motion filed by Carrico', 'Galen Carrico filed second Young motion citing breakdown in communication. Defendant materials allege counsel disregarded instructions.', 'CR23-0657', 'motion', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001),
('2024-10-28', 'Order granting motion to strike pro se sanctions filing', 'Court struck the sanctions motion and response under hybrid-representation rules.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '["faretta_self_representation","access_to_courts_interference"]', 60001),
('2024-10-30', 'Pro se motion for leave to file pro se motions', 'Church filed pro se motion seeking leave to file pro se motions because of alleged counsel ineffectiveness and obstruction.', 'CR23-0657', 'motion', 'confirmed', 1, '["faretta_self_representation","access_to_courts_interference"]', 60001),
('2024-11-26', 'Pro se motion to dismiss indictment with prejudice', 'Church filed motion alleging systemic constitutional violations, prosecutorial misconduct, and collusion. Issue flags: speedy trial, IAC, prosecutorial misconduct (allegations in filing).', 'CR23-0657', 'motion', 'alleged', 1, '["speedy_trial_delay","prosecutorial_misconduct","due_process_defect"]', 60001),
('2024-11-29', 'Pro se sanctions motion against Chief DDA Mary Kandaras', 'Church filed pro se sanctions motion alleging Chief DDA Kandaras intimidated him to cease direct communication. Allegations in filing.', 'CR23-0657', 'motion', 'alleged', 1, '["prosecutorial_misconduct","retaliation_first_amendment"]', 60001),
('2024-12-03', 'Order striking defendant''s late-November pro se filings', 'Judge Breslow struck late-November pro se filings because defendant was represented by counsel.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '["faretta_self_representation","access_to_courts_interference"]', 60001),
('2024-12-05', 'Young hearing — competency evaluation ordered; proceedings stayed', 'Transcript/minutes identify Judge Breslow, DDA Aziz Merchant, Galen Carrico, and Cameron Church. Court ordered competency evaluation, stayed proceedings, and restricted pro se filings.', 'CR23-0657', 'competency', 'confirmed', 1, '["competency_proceeding_abuse","faretta_self_representation","speedy_trial_delay"]', 60001),
('2024-12-09', 'Competency order entered nunc pro tunc to December 5', 'Competency order entered nunc pro tunc to December 5. Church filed pro se mandamus petition challenging Judge Breslow and DA''s office.', 'CR23-0657', 'competency', 'confirmed', 1, '["nunc_pro_tunc_concern","competency_proceeding_abuse"]', 60001),
('2024-12-16', 'Order to show cause — competency evaluation compliance', 'Court issued order to show cause for alleged non-compliance with competency evaluation and threatened bail/release consequences.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '["due_process_defect"]', 60001),
('2024-12-17', 'OSC hearing — pretrial release revoked; no-bail bench warrant issued', 'Minutes state pretrial release was revoked and no-bail bench warrant issued for failure to appear.', 'CR23-0657', 'warrant', 'confirmed', 1, '["warrant_or_bail_defect","competency_proceeding_abuse"]', 60001),
('2024-12-19', 'Bench warrant and extradition order materials', 'Record set includes bench warrant/no-bail hold and extradition order materials dated December 19, 2024.', 'CR23-0657', 'warrant', 'confirmed', 1, '["warrant_or_bail_defect"]', 60001);
